summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Magic Import Wizard (THADDAEUS) feature. Backend APIs 100% passing (20/20 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with all import wizard features working correctly including auto-analysis, Fix Everything Automatically, individual actions, and version snapshots.

issues: Console warning: Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled - minor React state management issue (pre-existing from iteration 2)

critical_code_review_comments: Import wizard implementation is solid with proper error handling
Version snapshots are correctly created during import workflow
AI integration uses real Emergent LLM Key - no mocking
seed_data_creation: Test versions and notes created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Magic Import Wizard (THADDAEUS) fully tested. Features verified: 1) Dialog auto-triggers analysis on open, 2) AI analysis displays word count, reading level, structure analysis, 3) Fix Everything Automatically runs autoformat, store_notes, full_qa and creates version snapshots, 4) Individual action buttons work (autoformat, store_notes, remove_notes, convert_notes, split_chapters, lantern_path, full_qa, extract_summaries, extract_characters, extract_glossary), 5) Version snapshots created: 'Imported Raw', 'Pre-FixEverything Backup', 'FixEverything Applied'. All AI calls use real Emergent LLM Key.

backend_apis: POST /api/ai/import/analyze - Manuscript analysis with word count, reading level, notes detection
POST /api/ai/import/action - All 10 action types (autoformat, remove_notes, store_notes, convert_notes, split_chapters, lantern_path, full_qa, extract_summaries, extract_characters, extract_glossary)
POST /api/versions - Version snapshot creation during import
POST /api/notes - Note creation from extracted notes
frontend_ui: Analysis results display: word count, reading level, structure analysis
Fix Everything Automatically button visible and functional
Progress indicator during Fix Everything workflow
Individual action buttons (11 total including 'Do Nothing')
Action result display with Implement/Ignore options
Version snapshots created and visible in Versions tab

mocked_apis: None - all AI calls use real Emergent LLM Key
